pattern: overly generic functional language without structural anchoring
claim_shape: means-plus-function phrasing coupled with indefinite breadth (e.g., 'means for administering antibody therapy in mammals' without specifying antibody type, dosage form, or delivery method)
remedy: replace functional phrases with explicit structural embodiments, define antibody isoform, administration route, dosage, and clinical context, and tie claim scope to disclosed embodiments rather than guarantee of novel function
